# Omni.Blazor

> Modern Blazor component library for .NET 10 — 167 components, warm cream/amber design system, dark mode, runtime accent swap, no Bootstrap/Tailwind. Published on NuGet as `AndersonN.Omni.Blazor` (namespace `Omni.Blazor`).

Install: `dotnet add package AndersonN.Omni.Blazor`, register `builder.Services.AddOmniComponents();`, put `<OmniTheme />` in `<head>`, and load the bundle from `_content/Omni.Blazor/css/omni.css` + `_content/Omni.Blazor/js/Omni.js`. CSS class prefix `omni-`, design-token prefix `--omni-`, JS namespace `window.omniBlazor`. Theme via `<html data-theme="light|dark">`, `data-accent="amber|crimson|emerald|blue|violet|teal|cyan|indigo|fuchsia|lime|orange|rose">`, `data-density="compact|comfortable|spacious">`.

## Buttons

- [OmniButton](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Buttons/OmniButton.razor): The library's base button: leading/trailing icons, variants, sizes, block, icon-only and loading states.
- [OmniFab](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Buttons/OmniFab.razor): Floating Action Button (FAB) — botão circular ancorado num canto da viewport pra ação primária de uma tela.
- [OmniFabMenu](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Buttons/OmniFabMenu.razor): FAB com menu expansível — clique no botão principal pra mostrar/esconder itens (OmniFabMenuItem).
- [OmniFabMenuItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Buttons/OmniFabMenuItem.razor): Item dentro de um OmniFabMenu — botão circular menor com label opcional ao lado (padrão Material: tooltip-style label flutuante).
- [OmniScrollToTopButton](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Buttons/OmniScrollToTopButton.razor): Botão "Voltar ao topo" auto-show/hide baseado em scroll position.
- [OmniSocialButton](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Buttons/OmniSocialButton.razor): External-auth provider button (Google, Microsoft, Apple, GitHub, Facebook, Passkey).
- [OmniSplitButton](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Buttons/OmniSplitButton.razor): Split button: ação primária à esquerda + chevron de dropdown à direita.
- [OmniToggleButton](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Buttons/OmniToggleButton.razor): Botão com estado liga/desliga (pressed/unpressed).

## Data

- [OmniChat](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Chat/OmniChat.razor): OmniChat — self-contained chat UI (RadzenChat port): header (title + roster + clear), a scrollable message list (avatar + bubble, aligned by author), and a comp…
- [OmniDataFilter](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/DataFilter/OmniDataFilter.razor): OmniDataFilter — a visual query builder (RadzenDataFilter port).
- [OmniDataFilterItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/DataFilter/OmniDataFilterItem.razor): OmniDataFilterItem — one node of an <OmniDataFilter> tree.
- [OmniDataFilterProperty](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/DataFilter/OmniDataFilterProperty.razor): OmniDataFilterProperty — declares one filterable field inside an
- [OmniDataGrid](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/OmniDataGrid.razor): Tabela de dados rica: sorting, paging, busca, filtros/agregações por coluna, agrupamento, seleção múltipla, master-detail, tree-grid, virtualização e export CSV…
- [OmniDataGridColumn](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/OmniDataGridColumn.razor): Column definition for an <OmniDataGrid> — declares title, value selector, templates, sorting/filtering/aggregation/grouping/freezing behavior.
- [OmniDayView](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Scheduler/OmniDayView.razor): Single-day view with time slots.
- [OmniDiagramCanvas](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Diagram/OmniDiagramCanvas.razor): OmniDiagramCanvas — generic infinite graph editor: pan/zoom, dotted grid, nodes with named ports, bezier edges, drag-to-connect, marquee selection, minimap, zoo…
- [OmniDropZone](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/OmniDropZone.razor): A single drop bucket.
- [OmniDropZoneContainer](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/OmniDropZoneContainer.razor): Kanban-style drag-and-drop container.
- [OmniDropZoneItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/OmniDropZoneItem.razor): Internal draggable item rendered by <OmniDropZone>.
- [OmniGantt](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Gantt/OmniGantt.razor): OmniGantt — project timeline inspired by RadzenGantt.
- [OmniGanttColumn](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Gantt/OmniGanttColumn.razor): Left-pane column for an OmniGantt.
- [OmniHtmlEditor](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/HtmlEditor/OmniHtmlEditor.razor)
- [OmniKanban](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/OmniKanban.razor): OmniKanban — quadro de colunas com cards arrastáveis.
- [OmniMonthView](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Scheduler/OmniMonthView.razor): Month grid (6 weeks × 7 days).
- [OmniMultiDayView](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Scheduler/OmniMultiDayView.razor): N consecutive days side-by-side with time slots (mirrors RadzenMultiDayView).
- [OmniPivotGrid](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Pivot/OmniPivotGrid.razor): OmniPivotGrid — pivot table (RadzenPivotDataGrid port).
- [OmniScheduler](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Scheduler/OmniScheduler.razor): OmniScheduler — calendar/agenda component inspired by RadzenScheduler.
- [OmniTree](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Tree/OmniTree.razor): OmniTree — hierarchical tree view (RadzenTree port).
- [OmniTreeItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Tree/OmniTreeItem.razor): A single node of an OmniTree.
- [OmniVirtualize](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/OmniVirtualize.razor): Thin wrapper over Blazor's built-in <Virtualize TItem="...">.
- [OmniWeekView](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Scheduler/OmniWeekView.razor): Seven-day week view with time slots.
- [OmniYearPlannerView](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Scheduler/OmniYearPlannerView.razor): Year planner: 12 month rows × day columns with appointment bars (mirrors RadzenYearPlannerView).
- [OmniYearTimelineView](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Scheduler/OmniYearTimelineView.razor): Year timeline: 12 month rows × day columns, connected timeline styling (mirrors RadzenYearTimelineView).
- [OmniYearView](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Data/Scheduler/OmniYearView.razor): Twelve mini-month calendars (mirrors RadzenYearView).

## Display

- [OmniAccordion](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniAccordion.razor): Group of collapsible panels.
- [OmniAccordionItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniAccordionItem.razor): A single collapsible panel within an OmniAccordion, with a clickable header (icon + title) and an expandable body.
- [OmniAlert](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniAlert.razor): Inline banner — persists on the page (unlike Toast which auto-dismisses).
- [OmniAvatar](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniAvatar.razor): Circular (or square) user avatar showing an image when available, otherwise fallback initials.
- [OmniAvatarGroup](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniAvatarGroup.razor): Overlapping stack of avatars with an optional "+N" overflow chip — for member lists, assignees, participants.
- [OmniBadge](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniBadge.razor): Dual-mode badge:
- [OmniBarcode](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniBarcode.razor): Renders a 1D barcode (Code128 / Code39 / EAN-13 / EAN-8 / UPC-A) as inline SVG.
- [OmniCard](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniCard.razor): Structural card container — a flex column whose direct children carry roles (header / body / media / footer), mirroring Bootstrap's `.card`.
- [OmniCardBody](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniCardBody.razor): Structural card part — an explicit padded body section.
- [OmniCardGroup](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniCardGroup.razor): OmniCardGroup — connects several <OmniCard> into one segmented set (RadzenCardGroup port): no gaps, squared inner corners, rounded outer ends, shared 1px divide…
- [OmniCardMedia](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniCardMedia.razor): Structural card part — a flush image / media block.
- [OmniCarousel](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniCarousel.razor): OmniCarousel — a slideshow that cycles through <OmniCarouselItem> slides (RadzenCarousel port).
- [OmniCarouselItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniCarouselItem.razor): OmniCarouselItem — a single slide inside an <OmniCarousel>.
- [OmniChart](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniChart.razor): SVG chart supporting Line, Area, Column, Bar, Pie and Donut series.
- [OmniChip](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniChip.razor): Compact pill/tag button — optional dot and icon, with active/accent/static visual states.
- [OmniDescriptionItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniDescriptionItem.razor): A single term/value pair for OmniDescriptionList.
- [OmniDescriptionList](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniDescriptionList.razor): Read-only key/value detail layout (term + value pairs) — the standard "detail / review / summary" primitive for entity pages, settings summaries and review-befo…
- [OmniEmptyState](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniEmptyState.razor): Empty / zero-data placeholder — for empty lists, no search results, first-run states, empty inboxes, cleared filters.
- [OmniIcon](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniIcon.razor): Render nothing when the icon name is unknown — emitting an empty wrapper span would (1) reserve layout space for a glyph that won't paint and (2) defeat CSS-onl…
- [OmniImage](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniImage.razor): OmniImage — a thin, consistent <img> wrapper (RadzenImage port).
- [OmniKbd](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniKbd.razor): Renders a keyboard key/shortcut as a styled <kbd> element.
- [OmniLabel](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniLabel.razor): Standalone <label> element for cases where OmniFormField is overkill (custom controls, plain text + value pairs, group of segmented buttons, etc.).
- [OmniLink](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniLink.razor): Styled <a> tag for navigation/text links.
- [OmniMarkdown](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniMarkdown.razor): OmniMarkdown — renders CommonMark-ish Markdown as HTML (RadzenMarkdown port).
- [OmniOptionCard](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniOptionCard.razor): Selectable option card (radio-style) — for choosing one option among several: plans, payment methods, shipping options, account types.
- [OmniProgress](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniProgress.razor): Horizontal progress bar, or a segmented variant (e.g.
- [OmniProgressCircular](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniProgressCircular.razor): OmniProgressCircular — an SVG ring progress indicator (RadzenProgressBarCircular port).
- [OmniQRCode](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniQRCode.razor): Renders a QR code as inline SVG.
- [OmniResult](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniResult.razor): Full-page / full-panel status outcome block — the generic primitive behind 404 / 403 / 500 / "access denied" / "payment complete" / maintenance pages.
- [OmniSkeleton](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniSkeleton.razor): Animated placeholder for loading content.
- [OmniSparkline](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniSparkline.razor): Mini chart inline em SVG — pra trends rápidos em Stat cards, células de tabela, headers de listas, parágrafos de texto.
- [OmniSpinner](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniSpinner.razor): Pure-CSS circular spinner.
- [OmniStat](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniStat.razor)
- [OmniStatGroup](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniStatGroup.razor): Responsive KPI strip — lays out a set of OmniStat cards in an even grid that collapses (Columns → 2 → 1) as the container narrows (container query, so it reacts…
- [OmniStatusBadge](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniStatusBadge.razor): Pílula compacta de status — primitivo do design system para indicar estado operacional (caixa aberto, API online, sincronizando, fila vazia, etc.).
- [OmniTimeline](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniTimeline.razor): OmniTimeline — vertical/horizontal sequence of events along a connecting line, inspired by RadzenTimeline.
- [OmniTimelineItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Display/OmniTimelineItem.razor): A single event on an <OmniTimeline>.

## Forms

- [OmniValidationMessage](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Forms/OmniValidationMessage.razor): Per-field error display.
- [OmniValidationSummary](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Forms/OmniValidationSummary.razor): Styled validation summary — like Blazor's <ValidationSummary> but uses the `omni-alert omni-alert-danger` look.

## Inputs

- [OmniAutoComplete](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniAutoComplete.razor)
- [OmniCalendar](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniCalendar.razor): Calendar grid.
- [OmniCheckBox](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniCheckBox.razor)
- [OmniCheckBoxList](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniCheckBoxList.razor)
- [OmniColorPicker](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniColorPicker.razor)
- [OmniDatePicker](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniDatePicker.razor)
- [OmniDateRangePicker](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniDateRangePicker.razor): Date range picker with a single combined input.
- [OmniFileUpload](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniFileUpload.razor): Drag-and-drop file uploader.
- [OmniFormField](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniFormField.razor): Field wrapper around an input.
- [OmniListBox](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniListBox.razor)
- [OmniMaskedTextBox](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniMaskedTextBox.razor)
- [OmniMultiSelect](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniMultiSelect.razor): Select múltiplo no estilo de chips dentro de um campo + popup com a lista de opções.
- [OmniNumeric](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniNumeric.razor)
- [OmniPassword](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniPassword.razor)
- [OmniPasswordStrength](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniPasswordStrength.razor): Password strength meter + configurable requirement checklist.
- [OmniPickList](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniPickList.razor): OmniPickList — a dual-list "transfer" picker (RadzenPickList port).
- [OmniQtyStepper](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniQtyStepper.razor)
- [OmniRadio](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniRadio.razor): Single radio button; registers with the enclosing OmniRadioGroup via cascading parameter.
- [OmniRadioGroup](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniRadioGroup.razor)
- [OmniRating](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniRating.razor)
- [OmniSecurityCode](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniSecurityCode.razor)
- [OmniSelect](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniSelect.razor)
- [OmniSlider](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniSlider.razor)
- [OmniSpeechToTextButton](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniSpeechToTextButton.razor): Botão pronto pra falar — wrapper visual de conveniência por cima do headless OmniSpeechToText.
- [OmniSwitch](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniSwitch.razor)
- [OmniTagInput](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniTagInput.razor): OmniTagInput — entrada de múltiplos valores de texto livre (tags, e-mails, escopos, rótulos).
- [OmniTextArea](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniTextArea.razor)
- [OmniTextBox](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniTextBox.razor)
- [OmniTimePicker](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Inputs/OmniTimePicker.razor): Time picker.

## Layout

- [OmniAppBar](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniAppBar.razor): Barra superior/inferior do <c>OmniLayout</c>.
- [OmniAppearanceToggle](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniAppearanceToggle.razor): Theme mode switcher — Light / Dark / System.
- [OmniAuthLayout](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniAuthLayout.razor): Auth page scaffold — centered card by default; pass a Brand fragment to get the split layout (dark brand panel + form panel).
- [OmniBanner](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniBanner.razor): Persistent, app-wide message bar — sits above the layout chrome and stays until dismissed (unlike OmniAlert which lives inline in page content, and toasts which…
- [OmniBento](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniBento.razor): OmniBento — grade 2D densa (Bento).
- [OmniBentoItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniBentoItem.razor): OmniBentoItem — tile tipado de um <c>OmniBento</c>.
- [OmniBrand](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniBrand.razor): Logo/marca do app: quadrado com inicial + nome (e tenant opcional); vira link quando Href é definido.
- [OmniBreakpointProvider](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniBreakpointProvider.razor): Cascades the current <see cref="Breakpoint"/> to descendants so they can branch their markup on viewport size from C# (no CSS-only conditionals).
- [OmniCol](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniCol.razor): Coluna do grid 12-colunas.
- [OmniContainer](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniContainer.razor): Wrapper centralizado com largura máxima responsiva.
- [OmniDrawer](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniDrawer.razor): Drawer / sidebar genérico — equivalente ao <c>MudDrawer</c> (MudBlazor),
- [OmniDrawerToggle](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniDrawerToggle.razor): Botão hamburger que alterna o estado de um <c>OmniDrawer</c>.
- [OmniFooter](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniFooter.razor): Footer slot do <c>OmniLayout</c>.
- [OmniHidden](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniHidden.razor): Renderiza condicionalmente subárvore baseado no breakpoint atual da viewport.
- [OmniLayout](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniLayout.razor): Container raiz do shell.
- [OmniMain](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniMain.razor): Área principal de conteúdo do <c>OmniLayout</c>.
- [OmniMasonry](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniMasonry.razor): OmniMasonry — layout em cascata (Pinterest): colunas de largura igual onde cada item mantém a altura natural e empilha na coluna mais curta, sem alinhar linhas.
- [OmniPaneHeader](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniPaneHeader.razor): Fixed (non-scrolling) header band at the top of a pane — typically a
- [OmniPaneToolbar](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniPaneToolbar.razor): Fixed (non-scrolling) toolbar band — typically below <OmniPaneHeader>.
- [OmniParallax](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniParallax.razor): OmniParallax — cena de parallax com camadas de profundidade.
- [OmniParallaxLayer](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniParallaxLayer.razor): OmniParallaxLayer — uma camada de profundidade de um <OmniParallax>.
- [OmniRow](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniRow.razor): Container grid 12-colunas responsivo.
- [OmniSplitAsideLabel](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniSplitAsideLabel.razor): Small uppercase label used to group sections inside a <OmniSplitView> aside.
- [OmniSplitView](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniSplitView.razor): Generic master/detail layout primitive: an aside (sub-navigation) + main content column inside a positioned parent (usually a <OmniMain>).
- [OmniSplitter](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniSplitter.razor): N-pane resizable splitter.
- [OmniSplitterPane](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniSplitterPane.razor): Pane child of <OmniSplitter>.
- [OmniStack](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniStack.razor): Container flex declarativo — equivalente a <c>MudStack</c> (MudBlazor) e
- [OmniSwipeArea](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniSwipeArea.razor): Detecta gestos de swipe (deslize) e dispara eventos com a direção e a distância.
- [OmniThemePicker](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniThemePicker.razor): Dropdown pronto para trocar accent + dark/light/system.
- [OmniToolBar](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Layout/OmniToolBar.razor): Faixa horizontal abaixo do <c>OmniAppBar</c>.

## Marketing

- [OmniEyebrow](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Marketing/OmniEyebrow.razor): Small uppercase kicker/label rendered above a heading, optionally preceded by an accent dot.
- [OmniHero](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Marketing/OmniHero.razor): Marketing hero section composing an eyebrow, title, subtitle and a CTA row above arbitrary child content.
- [OmniMosaic](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Marketing/OmniMosaic.razor): Grid container that lays out OmniMosaicCard children into a responsive mosaic.
- [OmniMosaicCard](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Marketing/OmniMosaicCard.razor): Single mosaic tile showing an optional icon plus a name and meta line, for use inside an OmniMosaic.

## Navigation

- [OmniBreadcrumb](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniBreadcrumb.razor): Breadcrumb trail (`<nav>`): renders Items as "/"-separated links, with the last (or path-less) item shown as the current page.
- [OmniExitPrompt](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniExitPrompt.razor): Intercepts navigation attempts when `When` returns true and asks the user to confirm.
- [OmniHotkey](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniHotkey.razor): Drop-in keyboard shortcut.
- [OmniMenuBar](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniMenuBar.razor): Horizontal navigation bar — tab-style root items with rich dropdowns.
- [OmniMenuBarItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniMenuBarItem.razor): One node of a OmniMenuBar.
- [OmniPagination](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniPagination.razor): Standalone pager — use anywhere outside of DataGrid (cards, timelines, custom lists).
- [OmniPanelMenu](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniPanelMenu.razor): Vertical navigation list (`<nav>`).
- [OmniPanelMenuItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniPanelMenuItem.razor): One node of a OmniPanelMenu.
- [OmniPanelMenuSection](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniPanelMenuSection.razor): Groups panel-menu items under an optional section heading.
- [OmniSegmentedControl](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniSegmentedControl.razor): Single-select segmented button group: renders Items as toggle buttons, highlighting the one matching Value.
- [OmniStep](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniStep.razor): A single step inside an OmniStepper; renders no markup itself and registers with the parent stepper, which draws its header and body.
- [OmniStepper](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniStepper.razor): Multi-step container.
- [OmniTabItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniTabItem.razor): A single tab inside an OmniTabs; renders no markup itself and registers with the parent, which draws the tab button and shows its body when active.
- [OmniTabs](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Navigation/OmniTabs.razor): Tab container: renders a tab bar from its OmniTabItem children and shows the active tab's body; the first registered tab is active by default.

## Overlay

- [AlertDialog](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/AlertDialog.razor): Conteúdo interno do dialog de alerta (mensagem + ícone opcional + botão OK) aberto via DialogService.AlertAsync.
- [ConfirmDialog](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/ConfirmDialog.razor): Conteúdo interno do dialog de confirmação (mensagem + botões Cancelar/OK) aberto via DialogService.ConfirmAsync; retorna true/false.
- [OmniBottomSheet](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniBottomSheet.razor): Material 3 Bottom Sheet — surface slides up from the bottom edge with optional drag handle + snap points.
- [OmniCommandPalette](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniCommandPalette.razor): ⌘K command palette — a global, searchable, keyboard-driven action menu.
- [OmniConfirmPrompt](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniConfirmPrompt.razor): Destructive-action confirmation that requires the user to TYPE a matching phrase before the confirm button enables (GitHub/Stripe/AWS pattern).
- [OmniContextMenuHost](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniContextMenuHost.razor): Portal host that renders the right-click/programmatic context menu driven by ContextMenuService; place once in the root layout.
- [OmniDialogHost](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniDialogHost.razor): Portal host that renders modal and side dialogs opened via DialogService (stacked, with backdrop, focus trap, scroll lock and Esc); place once in the root layou…
- [OmniMenu](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniMenu.razor): Reusable menu list — a panel of <OmniMenuItem>s (and optional separators).
- [OmniMenuItem](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniMenuItem.razor): A single clickable row inside an <OmniMenu>: optional icon, label, and keyboard-shortcut hint.
- [OmniMenuSeparator](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniMenuSeparator.razor): Horizontal divider between groups of <OmniMenuItem>s.
- [OmniNotificationHost](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniNotificationHost.razor): Portal host that renders the stack of toast notifications pushed via NotificationService (positioned, auto-dismissing); place once in the root layout.
- [OmniOverlay](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniOverlay.razor): Componente standalone de overlay/backdrop reutilizável.
- [OmniPopover](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniPopover.razor): Interactive popover — like Tooltip but with arbitrary content (links, forms, menus).
- [OmniTooltipHost](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniTooltipHost.razor): Portal host that renders the single active tooltip positioned by TooltipService; place once in the root layout.
- [OmniTour](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniTour.razor): Container declarativo de um tour.
- [OmniTourHost](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniTourHost.razor): Host único do OmniTour (portal).
- [OmniTourStep](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/src/Omni.Blazor/Components/Overlay/OmniTourStep.razor): Passo declarativo de um <OmniTour>.

## Optional

- [llms-full.txt](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/main/llms-full.txt): every component's parameters, events, slots, enum values and theme tokens.
- [components.json](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/main/docs/components.json): machine-readable manifest (same data, structured).
- [CLAUDE.md](https://github.com/afernandes/Omni.Blazor/blob/main/CLAUDE.md): repo architecture & authoring conventions.
